title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A multi-agent system design that skips LLM calls where deterministic logic suffices, using callback hooks (before_model_callback) to route tasks to code instead of the model. The example applies this to marathon route planning using the Spine & Sprout algorithm, scaling to 1,000 agents with zero LLM calls where autopilot runners use pure deterministic logic.
